title: santalum pyrularium
intro: Santalum pyrularium, also known as the Western Australian sandalwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to Western Australia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal and aromatic properties, with its essential oil extracted from the heartwood and roots. The medicinal properties of Santalum pyrularium include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe anxiety, and promote relaxation, while its health benefits include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin protection. Herbal preparations of Santalum pyrularium, such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to promote sleep, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
